text:
NAME: SRVC_END_DT_CD 

LONG NAME: SRVC_END_DT_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW Derived 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: 1 = IP header file, discharge date 
2 = LT or OT header file, service end date 
3 = LT or OT header file, service begin date 
4 = IP or OT line file, service end date (most recent date on any claim line) 
5 = IP line file, service begin date (most recent date on any claim line) 

COMMENT: To be included in a RIF, each claim must have a SRVC_END_DT.
